prompt: Can you check the WACC formula in my legacy model? I want to make sure the math is right before we do anything else with it.
assertions: Reads the WACC formula from the model (cell B16 or via inspection)
Presents the LaTeX-notation equivalent of the WACC formula
Verifies that equity weight + debt weight equals 1.0
Verifies that only the debt term is multiplied by (1 - Tax Rate)
Verifies cost of equity and cost of debt are in the same units (both decimals or both percentages)
Identifies the formula uses cell references ($B$10, $B$12, etc.) and flags this as an IDFA violation requiring Named Ranges
